residents_comments: Resident very happy with the food distribution from various organizations in response to the coronavirus.
Residents very happy with the flu shot clinic being established at Attick Towers.
executive_directors_report: Live in officer: Mark Grimes has accepted the position contingent on viewing the unit #300 tomorrow.
Free meals: Every other Wednesday, has been going smoothly, and residents are very appreciative.
Result of the RFP for legal services: Results by the end of the month.
Security grant: Applying for a HUD grant for surveillance and lighting
Laundry machines: Converting the laundry and dryer machines from coin to card acceptance
Cleaning company: Cleaning company doing a deep cleaning of the building today
Ms. Keeler volunteered to put together some items to assist the residents in coping with anxiety, and will send it to the Gleason stated she will check to verify that the suicide notice is
decisions: Unanimously approved the regular monthly meeting minutes held on September 24, as amended
Approved the payment of the invoice submitted for the elevator contract for $2,419.26
raw_text: Meeting Minutes - Regular Monthly Meeting - October 22, 2020
